headline: UnitedHealthcare Champions Industry Effort to Standardize Prior Authorization Requirements
summary: April 24, 2026--UnitedHealthcare today announced more than half of its prior authorization volume will be included in an industrywide effort to standardize submission requirements for electronic prior authorization, and that number will advance to more than 70% by the end of 2026. This step is the next phase of the company’s ongoing efforts to modernize and simplify prior authorization for care providers and help patients more easily and quickly access safe, high‑quality, evidence‑based care, al

headline: A $900,000 Stock Portfolio Exposed to Just Three Sectors Is a Retirement Time Bomb
summary: At 63, with $900,000 in a brokerage account split across tech (45%), healthcare (30%), and financials (25%), you have built something real. The five holdings — Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL), Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ), UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH), and JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) — are legitimate blue-chip businesses. The problem is what happens to all three sectors ... A $900,000 Stock Portfolio Exposed to Just Three Sectors Is a Retirement Time Bomb
